name: product-growth-skills
description: Product growth skills for Claude — diagnose where to focus your growth efforts.

plugins.name: product-growth
plugins.description: Diagnose where a product should focus its growth efforts; produces a driver-tree growth map and a ranked shortlist of focus areas with a top 3.

plugins.name: experiment-design
plugins.description: Brainstorm, shortlist, and design growth experiments for a chosen focus area; produces an ICE-scored shortlist, a top-3 experiment portfolio, and a full design for each. Picks up where a growth diagnosis leaves off.
